setup:win.run: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .venv, src\\shemul.egg-info -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; py -3 -m venv .venv; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install -e ."

setup:unix.run: rm -rf .venv src/shemul.egg-info; python3 -m venv .venv; .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip; .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e .
